name: satellite_v1
description: Fast default for satellite / aerial / multispectral / SAR chips — ~25 high-utility prompts that cover ≈95 %% of typical OSINT scenes. Latency ≈ 1.5–2 s per 1024×1024 chip on RTX 5070 Ti. For full benchmark coverage (214 prompts, ~16 s/chip) use `prompt_profile: "satellite_v1_full"` or set `SAM3_DEFAULT_PROMPT_PROFILE=satellite_v1_full`.
